hooks.command: root="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -n "$root" ] && command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f "$root/hooks/inject-router.js" ]; then output="$(node "$root/hooks/inject-router.js" SessionStart 2>/dev/null)" && [ -n "$output" ] && printf '%s' "$output"; fi; exit 0
hooks.commandWindows: $root = if ($env:PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:PLUGIN_ROOT } else { $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT }; if ($root -and (Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { try { $script = Join-Path $root 'hooks\inject-router.js'; if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $script -PathType Leaf -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $output = & node $script SessionStart 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0 -and $null -ne $output) { [Console]::Out.Write(($output -join [Environment]::NewLine)) } } } catch {} }; exit 0

hooks.command: root="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -n "$root" ] && command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f "$root/hooks/inject-router.js" ]; then output="$(node "$root/hooks/inject-router.js" SubagentStart 2>/dev/null)" && [ -n "$output" ] && printf '%s' "$output"; fi; exit 0
hooks.commandWindows: $root = if ($env:PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:PLUGIN_ROOT } else { $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT }; if ($root -and (Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { try { $script = Join-Path $root 'hooks\inject-router.js'; if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $script -PathType Leaf -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $output = & node $script SubagentStart 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0 -and $null -ne $output) { [Console]::Out.Write(($output -join [Environment]::NewLine)) } } } catch {} }; exit 0
